description: overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config.nix and emacs-vanilla-config.nix are ~85% identical. Both implement the same org-tangle build process differing only in which .org file they process. Extract a parameterized builder function that accepts the org file as input, reducing ~100 lines of duplication to ~40.
title: Deduplicate emacs-config and emacs-vanilla-config overlays
